Summary
Machine Learning Engineer with hands-on experience building end-to-end geospatial AI pipelines, deep learning models, and
full-stack production applications. Skilled in computer vision, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and ML deployment using

Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, FastAPI, and React, with proven results across healthcare, agriculture, and document-intelligence
domains.
Professional Experience
AI/ML Intern
Forest by HeartfulNess
Pune, India
Jan 2026 – May 2026
• Architected an end-to-end geospatial AI pipeline for automated tree species identification using high-resolution drone orthoim-
agery (GeoTIFF, ≤3.5 cm/pixel).

agery (GeoTIFF, ≤3.5 cm/pixel).
• Engineered a processing pipeline for 4-band RGBA rasters (3–31M pixels per tile), enabling classification across 27+ tree species
over agricultural plots in Hyderabad, India.
• Validated the model against 3,300+ GPS-tagged, georeferenced ground-truth trees in UTM Zone 44N, delivering the full deep
learning workflow from raw drone imagery to per-tree species predictions.

DermScan – Clinical Skin Lesion Screening & Growth Tracking
Jan 2026
Python, React, TensorFlow, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker
• Developed a full-stack clinical AI application for early-stage skin lesion screening, training an EfficientNetB3 model on 25,331
ISIC 2019 dermoscopy images.

ISIC 2019 dermoscopy images.
• Implemented Grad-CAM explainability and automated ABCDE clinical scoring for interpretable predictions, plus longitudinal
lesion growth tracking across patient visits.
• Built a full-stack platform with FastAPI and React, including JWT authentication, PostgreSQL persistence, automated PDF
report generation, and a Recharts analytics dashboard.
• Containerized the stack with Docker Compose, orchestrating a FastAPI backend, Nginx-served React + Vite frontend, and

PostgreSQL database for streamlined deployment.
DocuChat AI – RAG-based Document Intelligence Platform
Mar 2026
Python, FastAPI, React, LangChain, FAISS, Sentence Transformers
• Built a full-stack RAG application enabling users to upload PDFs and chat with documents via context-aware AI with page-level
source citations.
• Designed an end-to-end RAG pipeline using PyMuPDF, LangChain, Sentence Transformers, FAISS, and the Gemini API for
document parsing, semantic retrieval, and grounded generation.

document parsing, semantic retrieval, and grounded generation.
• Developed an AI-powered quiz engine generating MCQ, True/False, and short-answer questions with automated evaluation and
detailed feedback reporting.
• Architected modular REST APIs for document processing, vector search, chat, quiz generation, and evaluation, reducing
hallucination via retrieval-grounded responses with exact page citations.
